name: Data issue

**Layer / file**
e.g. `data/schemas/02-verplichtingen.schema.json`, `correspondentie.jsonl`, `fixtures/truus-cees.json`

**What did you expect?**

**What did you observe?**
Include the seed and command if reproducible:

```
python -m generate --seed 42 --n 500
```

**Suggested fix (optional)**
